bugs.title: Plan's :1.21.4:generateWiki invocation does not work standalone -- requires chiseledGenerateWiki wrapper
bugs.evidence: Running ./gradlew :1.21.4:generateWiki directly fails with: ':1.21.4:compileKotlin' FAILED on CombatHooksGametest.kt:278 (per-version startRiding signature in unprocessed source). Stonecutter 0.6 only swaps source-set srcDirs to chiseledSrc inside the 'chiseled' task wrapper. The CI workflow's 'run: ./gradlew :1.21.4:generateWiki publishWiki' will fail in CI for the same reason.
bugs.expected: Either (a) update CI to use chiseledGenerateWiki, or (b) generalize publishWiki to call chiseledGenerateWiki, or (c) modify generateWiki to use a per-version chiseled-aware compile chain.
bugs.suggested_fix: Change .github/workflows/wiki-publish.yml line 'run: ./gradlew :1.21.4:generateWiki publishWiki' to 'run: ./gradlew chiseledGenerateWiki :1.21.4:publishWiki' OR factor publishWiki to depend on chiseledGenerateWiki + a per-version aggregate step. Since the plan explicitly froze the CI workflow as-is for Phase 6, this is documented as a known follow-up rather than fixed in-cycle.

concerns: Plan's WikiGenTest used @TempDir on a lateinit instance field; with PER_CLASS lifecycle + @BeforeAll, JUnit 5 does not inject before @BeforeAll runs. Fixed by passing @TempDir as a method parameter.
Plan's build.gradle.kts used inline java.io.File FQN; needed an explicit import. Trivial Kotlin DSL fix.

Plan's WikiTemplates.kt referenced Property.SPECIAL and omitted RangeKind.SLING/BLOWGUN; actual enums have Property.SPECIAL_LANCE and RangeKind.SLING/BLOWGUN. Adjusted mappings per plan's own guidance (line 443).
